options.content:
## Multi-AI Tool Comparison: Copilot vs Kiro
Compare GitHub Copilot and Kiro (Amazon Q Developer) adoption and usage side by side.

**Note:** Copilot metrics come from `_tool_copilot_enterprise_daily_metrics` (enterprise-level aggregates). Kiro metrics come from `_tool_q_dev_user_report` and `_tool_q_dev_user_data`. Select the Copilot connection and scope using the dropdowns above.

panels.description: Weekly active users for both tools

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  DATE_SUB(DATE(date), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(DATE(date)) DAY) AS time,
  COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS 'Kiro Active Users'
FROM _tool_q_dev_user_report
WHERE $__timeFilter(date)
GROUP BY DATE_SUB(DATE(date), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(DATE(date)) DAY)
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  DATE_SUB(DATE(day), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(DATE(day)) DAY) AS time,
  MAX(daily_active_users) AS 'Copilot Active Users'
FROM _tool_copilot_enterprise_daily_metrics
WHERE connection_id = ${copilot_connection_id}
  AND scope_id = '${copilot_scope_id}'
  AND $__timeFilter(day)
GROUP BY DATE_SUB(DATE(day), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(DATE(day)) DAY)
ORDER BY time

panels.title: Weekly Active Users Comparison

panels.description: Weekly code generation and acceptance events

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  DATE_SUB(DATE(date), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(DATE(date)) DAY) AS time,
  SUM(inline_suggestions_count) AS 'Kiro: Suggestions',
  SUM(inline_acceptance_count) AS 'Kiro: Accepted'
FROM _tool_q_dev_user_data
WHERE $__timeFilter(date)
GROUP BY DATE_SUB(DATE(date), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(DATE(date)) DAY)
ORDER BY time

panels.title: Kiro: Code Suggestions & Acceptance

panels.description: Weekly Copilot code generation and acceptance events

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  DATE_SUB(DATE(day), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(DATE(day)) DAY) AS time,
  SUM(code_generation_activity_count) AS 'Copilot: Suggestions',
  SUM(code_acceptance_activity_count) AS 'Copilot: Accepted'
FROM _tool_copilot_enterprise_daily_metrics
WHERE connection_id = ${copilot_connection_id}
  AND scope_id = '${copilot_scope_id}'
  AND $__timeFilter(day)
GROUP BY DATE_SUB(DATE(day), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(DATE(day)) DAY)
ORDER BY time

panels.title: Copilot: Code Suggestions & Acceptance

panels.description: Weekly AI-generated lines of code accepted

targets.rawSql:
SELECT time, SUM(kiro_loc) AS 'Kiro LOC Accepted', SUM(copilot_loc) AS 'Copilot LOC Added'
FROM (
  SELECT DATE_SUB(DATE(date), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(DATE(date)) DAY) AS time,
    SUM(inline_ai_code_lines + chat_ai_code_lines) AS kiro_loc, 0 AS copilot_loc
  FROM _tool_q_dev_user_data WHERE $__timeFilter(date)
  GROUP BY DATE_SUB(DATE(date), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(DATE(date)) DAY)
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DATE_SUB(DATE(day), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(DATE(day)) DAY) AS time,
    0 AS kiro_loc, SUM(loc_added_sum) AS copilot_loc
  FROM _tool_copilot_enterprise_daily_metrics
  WHERE connection_id = ${copilot_connection_id}
    AND scope_id = '${copilot_scope_id}'
    AND $__timeFilter(day)
  GROUP BY DATE_SUB(DATE(day), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(DATE(day)) DAY)
) combined
GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: LOC Accepted: Kiro vs Copilot

panels.description: Overall acceptance rates for both tools

targets.rawSql:
SELECT 'Kiro' AS Tool,
  ROUND(SUM(inline_acceptance_count) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(inline_suggestions_count), 0), 1) AS 'Acceptance Rate'
FROM _tool_q_dev_user_data
WHERE $__timeFilter(date)
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Copilot' AS Tool,
  ROUND(SUM(code_acceptance_activity_count) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(code_generation_activity_count), 0), 1)
FROM _tool_copilot_enterprise_daily_metrics
WHERE connection_id = ${copilot_connection_id}
  AND scope_id = '${copilot_scope_id}'
  AND $__timeFilter(day)

panels.title: Acceptance Rate Comparison

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT connection_id FROM _tool_copilot_scopes ORDER BY connection_id DESC
list.label: Copilot Connection
list.name: copilot_connection_id
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT connection_id FROM _tool_copilot_scopes ORDER BY connection_id DESC

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT id FROM _tool_copilot_scopes WHERE connection_id = CAST('${copilot_connection_id}' AS UNSIGNED)
list.label: Copilot Scope
list.name: copilot_scope_id
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT id FROM _tool_copilot_scopes WHERE connection_id = CAST('${copilot_connection_id}' AS UNSIGNED)
